languages.text: "Эоганн врачевал древнюю реликвию Сектора Бионика, он может помочь".
"Eogunn tended to the ancient relic in the Sector Bionica — he can help."
languages.original_text: "Эоганн врачевал древнюю реликвию Сектора Бионика, он может помочь".

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn tended to the ancient relic of the Sector Bionica, he can help."
"Eogunn tended to the ancient relic of the Sector Bionica, he can help."
"Eogunn tended to the ancient relic in the Sector Bionica — he can help."
"Eogunn tended to the ancient relic in the Sector Bionica — he can help."

languages.text: «Eogunn cuidó de la antigua reliquia del Sector Bionica. Puede ayudar».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn tended to the ancient relic in the Sector Bionica — he can help."

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn cuidó de la antigua reliquia del Sector Bionica. Puede ayudar».

languages.text: 「エオガンはセクター・ビオニカで古の遺物の手入れをしていた――彼なら助けになる」
languages.original_text: "Eogunn tended to the ancient relic in the Sector Bionica — he can help."

traits.locale_text: 「エオガンはセクター・ビオニカで古の遺物の手入れをしていた――彼なら助けになる」

languages.text: “伊奥贡在仿生区维护过那件远古圣物，他应该能帮上忙。”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn tended to the ancient relic in the Sector Bionica — he can help."

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡在仿生区维护过那件远古圣物，他应该能帮上忙。”

languages.text: "Eogunn hat sich um das alte Relikt im Sektor Bionica gekümmert ... er kann helfen."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn tended to the ancient relic in the Sector Bionica — he can help."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn hat sich um das alte Relikt im Sektor Bionica gekümmert ... er kann helfen."

languages.text: « Eogunn s'est occupé de l'ancienne relique du secteur Bionica. Il peut aider. »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn tended to the ancient relic in the Sector Bionica — he can help."

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn s'est occupé de l'ancienne relique du secteur Bionica. Il peut aider. »

languages.text: "Eogunn, Sektör Biyonika'daki kadim yadigârla ilgilenmişti. O yardım edebilir."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn tended to the ancient relic in the Sector Bionica — he can help."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, Sektör Biyonika'daki kadim yadigârla ilgilenmişti. O yardım edebilir."
